description: The Bacon brothers are a trio of gangsters from Abbotsford, British Columbia, Canada, involved in drug trafficking and firearms offenses. They are implicated in multiple homicides in the Fraser Valley and Greater Vancouver area. The brothers rose from a middle-class background to become prominent figures in organized crime. Jonathan Bacon was murdered in 2011.

country_links.evidence_quote: Adding to the criticism were photographs that the Bacon brothers posted on social media showing themselves enjoying lavish vacations in Mexico.
country_links.context: The Bacon brothers enjoyed lavish vacations in Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2018, Riach was convicted of drug trafficking in the Philippines and sentenced to life imprisonment.
country_links.context: Riach, a member of the Wolfpack Alliance, was convicted of drug trafficking in the Philippines.

country_links.evidence_quote: G.L had served a prison sentence in California for smuggling cocaine from Mexico, and upon his return to Canada contacted Wayne Scott...
country_links.context: The informer G.L. had connections with organized crime in the United States and had served a prison sentence in California for smuggling cocaine from Mexico.
